content: Backend: Rewrite sizes.py to use a screenshot-only flow — Gemini 2.5 Flash as primary vision (skip Gemma since vision_disabled in Phase 1), with a tight OCR-focused prompt
Extension: Remove HTML extraction logic — send only the cropped screenshot
Rewrite system prompt to be laser-focused on chart OCR + measurement matching (no fashion language)
Rebuild extension, restart backend, run end-to-end smoke test with a real chart image
